1.notes: Next.js scaffold, required packages, PWA/image config, folder skeleton, and Supabase migrations are complete. GitHub origin pushed to AbdoDernawi/store main. Supabase project store (drjibcdcwrzeoobduhgt) is active with 37 public tables, RLS enabled, and clean security advisors. Vercel project elhabiebs-projects/store is linked to GitHub and production deployed at https://store-teal-six.vercel.app. Local and Vercel builds passed.

2.notes: Authentication & Role-Based Routing is implemented and verified locally and on production. Added Arabic light minimalist login/register pages, custom JWT cookie session, Supabase SSR clients, role middleware, initial dashboards for admin/marketer/delivery/customer, and Supabase Edge Function auth-password-v2 using Supabase Auth for password validation. Local lint/build passed; browser and HTTP checks verified redirects and role access. Vercel production at https://store-teal-six.vercel.app was deployed and checked for login, admin protection, and auth rejection behavior.

3a.notes: Inventory & Smart Warehouse API is complete. Added allocation, reserve, release, return-stock, transfer APIs and database functions. Verified in Supabase with a rollback transaction: order quantity 6 split across two warehouses by priority and created 2 reserved warehouse_movements.

3b.notes: Order Lifecycle API is complete. Added create, approve, reject, package create, QR scan, deliver, cash handover confirm, bank transfer confirm, and cancel APIs. Supabase rollback verification completed create→approve→QR→deliver→cash confirm with delivered final status, QR assignment true, and marketer wallet balance 30.00.

4a.notes: Admin Interface phase A is complete. Added Arabic RTL admin shell, sidebar/topbar, dashboard period toggle, urgent task cards, finance metrics with net profit, sales chart, delivery custody, top marketers, orders search/filter list, and order detail actions panel. Local lint/build passed and browser check verified protected admin routing.

4b.notes: Admin Interface phase B is verified. Product image processing, product/warehouse/supplier/user/finance/settings/content/invoice admin pages, storage bucket product-images, storage policies, and admin management RPC/API work are implemented. The previous production blocker was resolved by adding SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to Vercel production and redeploying dpl_BkjWxnu1LHuUjg8L6yjqRXYEVDqe.

5a.notes: Marketer Interface phase A is complete. Added mobile-first RTL marketer shell with bottom nav, real dashboard stats, safe marketer catalog RPC that returns only allowed product fields, product browsing, variant selection, cart/order form, customer autocomplete/autofill with saved address/city/zone fields, instant delivery fee display, and bank-transfer image upload. Supabase migration phase5a_marketer_frontend was applied remotely. Local lint/build passed, browser verification loaded /marketer/products and /marketer/dashboard, and Supabase rollback SQL confirmed marketer catalog visibility plus create_store_order -> pending_approval with marketer_customers auto-save. Production DB currently has no seed products/cities/zones/marketer accounts, so the live catalog remains empty until admin data is added.

5b.notes: Marketer Interface phase B is complete. Added marketer orders list/detail with status filters, delivery agent display, always-visible invoice preview, timeline history with changed-by names, pending-order edit/cancel actions, cancellation requests after approval, wallet balance with transaction/payout history, virtual store settings with Cropper.js logo upload and color pickers, notifications list with mark-read-on-view, and order chat available only while out_for_delivery. Supabase migration phase5b_marketer_tools was applied remotely and verified with 4 functions plus store-logos bucket/policies. Local lint/build passed. Browser verification used Playwright screenshots for /marketer/orders mobile and /marketer/settings desktop. Chat verification passed grep: setInterval and clearInterval exist; no Supabase Realtime/channel usage found.

6.notes: Delivery Interface phase is complete. Added mobile-first RTL delivery shell with bottom navigation, dashboard stats, available packages, QR scanning via html5-qrcode plus manual fallback, custody cards with phone/address/payment badges, order detail actions for full delivery/partial return/full return/excuse request, delivery-only chat with 15s polling and clearInterval cleanup, handover creation for full cash/partial cash/return goods, report page, notifications page, delivery APIs, and Supabase phase6_delivery_interface migration. Supabase migration was applied remotely as 20260520231841_phase6_delivery_interface and verified: 5 functions plus delivery_excuses table exist, QR scan assigns first time and second scan returns PACKAGE_ALREADY_ASSIGNED, and cash handover creation returns pending. Local lint/build passed.

7.notes: Customer Interface phase is complete. Added mobile-first RTL customer shell with soft bottom navigation, home banners/categories/featured products, product catalog and cart using customer_price only, unavailable product blocking, saved/manual address ordering, delivery fee displayed separately, customer orders list/detail with timeline and delivery contact, editable pending orders, cancellation requests, invoice archive with text and date-range search, account address CRUD, password change, and customer APIs. Supabase migration phase7_customer_interface was applied remotely as 20260521071601 and verified with rollback SQL: catalog exposes no cost/marketer fields, zero-stock orders return PRODUCT_OUT_OF_STOCK, and available stock creates a customer pending_approval order with delivery_fee separate. Local lint/build passed.

7b.notes: Practical admin refinements are complete. Added configurable expense types, payment methods with automatic treasuries, expense recording from a selected treasury, category management with add/show/hide controls, and delivery agent custody management with pending handover confirmation. Supabase migration admin_finance_delivery_categories was applied remotely as 20260521121359 and verified with rollback SQL for finance and category flows. Local lint/build passed.

7c.notes: Warehouse UX refinement is complete and aligned with the approved light reference without the map. Admin warehouses now use a compact overview with warehouse list and recent movement feed, a stock filter table, a three-column multi-product transfer board with picker/cart/destination layout, and an options-focused product edit drawer with visible stock deletion locks. Batch transfer, batch inventory adjustment, the soft priority planner, and safe variant edit/delete APIs remain in place. Supabase migration warehouse_shop_operations was applied remotely as 20260521151350; Supabase verification confirmed warehouse movement joins are available for the overview feed. Local lint/build passed and Playwright desktop/mobile checks verified the warehouse page layout without horizontal overflow.

8.notes: Invoices + PDF + QR phase is complete. Added package QR generation, automatic invoice archiving on package creation, browser invoice preview with print/download/share plus A4/A5/80mm controls, a package print page with embedded QR, and jsPDF invoice rendering with embedded Noto Sans Arabic fonts for Arabic output. Virtual invoices load virtual_stores identity without mixing original-store values; original invoices use server-configured store identity values. Supabase verification confirmed invoice/package records plus a virtual invoice identity sample. Local lint/build passed, the build trace includes the Arabic font assets for /api/invoices/generate, direct PDF render verification produced A4/A5/thermal PDF bytes with QR and embedded font data, and Playwright loaded the protected admin invoice archive shell.

9.notes: Final testing and production launch readiness verified. Supabase rollback E2E covered marketer cash cycle, partial return to selected warehouse, bank transfer treasury + delivery notice, cancellation after approval with inventory restoration, smart allocation split 2/4 by priority, and duplicate QR blocking with the Arabic UI message. Seed data exists for demo users, cities, zones, warehouses, treasuries, products, inventory, and orders. PWA manifest now has 192/512 and maskable icons, local Arabic fonts, service worker registration, and excludes the missing App Router app-build-manifest precache entry. Vercel production env names were confirmed and QR_SECRET_KEY was rotated to 64 characters. Local lint/build passed, product image processing outputs WebP, no Supabase Realtime/WebSocket usage was found, and Playwright production-shell verification passed with serviceWorker ready, icon/font assets loaded, no console errors, no failed requests, and no WebSocket connections. On 2026-06-04 the Supabase project was restored from inactive to ACTIVE_HEALTHY, demo user names were corrected, all six demo Auth passwords were reset to the shared demo password, and production login plus protected role pages were verified for super_admin, admin, marketer, delivery, and customer roles. Added /api/health for production dependency checks, applied Supabase function ACL hardening so anon can execute 0 public RPC functions, and removed broad public listing policies from product-images and store-logos buckets. Applied Advisor performance fixes: all missing foreign-key indexes are now covered, auth_rls_initplan warnings were cleared by wrapping auth.uid() in RLS policies with select auth.uid(), and production role login smoke tests still pass.

known_issues: Exact file project_docs_v2.docx was not found; used latest matching file C:\Users\hp\Downloads\project_docs (1).docx.
Phase 3 APIs use the user's Supabase access token stored in httpOnly cookies so they can respect RLS without exposing SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in client code.

Supabase Edge Function auth-password v1 remains deployed but unused after an Edge runtime boot issue; active authentication uses auth-password-v2 and the admin user API now has a Vercel service-role fallback.
